title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese presents four rules for prompting Claude Code based on how Anthropic engineers use it: prompt for skills rather than specific outputs, treat skills as composable modules, reuse scripts within skills, and expect skills to improve iteratively. The guidance emphasizes composability and session-based learning over one-off custom prompts.
